CVE-2025-10911.title: A use-after-free vulnerability was found in libxslt while parsing ...
CVE-2025-10911.description: A use-after-free vulnerability was found in libxslt while parsing xsl nodes that may lead to the dereference of expired pointers and application crash.

CVE-2025-11731.title: A flaw was found in the exsltFuncResultComp() function of libxslt ...
CVE-2025-11731.description: A flaw was found in the exsltFuncResultComp() function of libxslt, which handles EXSLT <func:result> elements during stylesheet parsing. Due to improper type handling, the function may treat an XML document node as a regular XML element node, resulting in a type confusion. This can cause unexpected memory reads and potential crashes. While difficult to exploit, the flaw could lead to application instability or denial of service.
